name: PipeSecure
description: Watches the 216labs GitHub repo for security vulnerabilities. On every push, clones the repo, runs Semgrep and ast-grep, and automatically creates GitHub issues for new findings. Issues are closed automatically when vulnerabilities are resolved.

env_vars.description: GitHub PAT with repo and issues write access
Shared secret for GitHub webhook HMAC verification
Optional OpenAI key for AI triage of findings
Set to 'true' to run a full scan when the container starts
